FamilyState.title: FamilyState
FamilyState.description: Entire chore, points, and family data synced across devices

kids.description: List of active kids and spouses with their pins and point balances

chores.description: List of chores with assigned kids, frequencies, and status

rewards.description: List of purchaseable rewards and point costs

pending.description: List of pending chore completions waiting parent approval

redemptions.description: List of redeemed reward items and purchase history

initialized.description: Indicator if the state has been populated

/family-data/{documentId}.description: Stores the shared family dashboard state for real-time synchronization
